text: I found several charges on my credit card that I never authorized. This is clearly fraud and if it is not reversed I will contact my attorney and take legal action.
I was charged a $99 annual fee on my credit card and I would like an explanation of why it applies to my account.
My credit card was stolen and someone used it for fraudulent purchases at stores I have never visited.
My mortgage servicer misapplied my last two payments and my escrow account now shows a shortage that is not my fault.
The bank is trying to foreclose on my home over a payment dispute. My lawyer says this is wrongful and we will sue.
A debt collector calls me every day and has been threatening and abusive about a debt I already disputed.
I received a debt collection letter for an amount I do not recognize and I would like it validated.
My checking account was charged an overdraft fee even though I had a positive balance. Please review it.
Someone made unauthorized withdrawals from my checking account. I believe my account was hacked and money was taken without my consent.
There is an inaccurate late payment on my credit report that does not belong to me and I want it corrected.
expected_category: Credit reporting or other personal consumer reports

text: My student loan servicer placed me in the wrong repayment plan and has not processed my income-driven repayment application.
I sent a wire transfer to another bank a week ago and the money was never received by the recipient.
expected_category: Money transfer, virtual currency, or money service

text: The balance on my prepaid card disappeared and several transactions I did not make appeared overnight.
My elderly disabled father's car was wrongfully repossessed even though his auto loan payments were current.
I took out a payday loan and the APR and fees disclosed are not what I was told at signing.
expected_category: Payday loan, title loan, personal loan, or advance loan

text: My mortgage payment was posted to the wrong account and now I am being reported as late.
A debt settlement company charged me fees but never contacted my creditors as promised.
My credit report was accessed and someone opened accounts using my identity. This is identity theft and fraud.
expected_category: Credit reporting or other personal consumer reports
